---
name: Bug report
about: Report a problem with Cool Blog
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Reproduction Steps

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, logs, or screenshots.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- **OS**: [e.g. macOS 14.0, Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- **Browser**: [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121, Safari 17]
- **Node.js Version**: [e.g. 20.10.0]
- **Project Version**: [e.g. 1.0.0]
- **Deployment**: [e.g. Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, local dev]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here:

- Error logs
- Browser console output
- Server logs
- Configuration details (remove sensitive data)

## Checklist

- [ ] I've searched for similar issues
- [ ] I've provided a minimal reproduction
- [ ] I've included environment details
- [ ] I've included relevant logs/screenshots
